import asyncio


async def fetch_data(url: str) -> dict:
    return {"url": url, "data": "sample"}


def process_items(items: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    results = []
    for item in items:
        result = loop.run_until_complete(fetch_data(f"https://api.example.com/{item}"))
        results.append(result)
    return results


async def main():
    items = ["a", "b", "c"]
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    for item in items:
        data = loop.run_until_complete(fetch_data(f"https://api.example.com/{item}"))
        print(data)
